text_original: great but has a bad habit of the ai talking for u and the character u made and its a piss off
text_zh: 很好，但AI会替你说话，而你创建的角色却得不到体现，让人很烦
reply_original: Hi there! We're sorry the AI's behavior felt overwhelming. While AI's enthusiasm is part of the roleplay, we understand it might not align with your expectations. Please share specific examples via support@fantachat.ai so we can refine the experience. Your feedback helps us improve!
reply_zh: 你好！我们为AI的行为让你感到压力表示歉意。虽然AI的热情是角色扮演的一部分，但我们理解这可能不符合你的预期。请通过support@fantachat.ai提供具体示例，这样我们可以优化体验。您的反馈帮助我们不断改进！
